title: Results of astaxanthin and EPA extraction from Nannochloropsis S4 strain
author: A4F-Algafuel (Portugal)
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Results of the extraction experiments on Nannochloropsis S4 strain in the framework of the EIC-TRANSITION ASTEASIER project. Extractio were done by the biorefinery unit of A4F (Portugal). Extractions were tested on wet or dry biomass. Concentration of carotenoids and EPA in the initial sample and the extraction efficiencies are reported
steps_raw: Results of the extraction experiments on Nannochloropsis S4 strain in the framework of the EIC-TRANSITION ASTEASIER project. Extractio were done by the biorefinery unit of A4F (Portugal). Extractions were tested on wet or dry biomass. Concentration of carotenoids and EPA in the initial sample and the extraction efficiencies are reported
